waiting_for: Pullback to 30100 (flipped support) or EMA21 (30079.82) for long entry; stochastic at 69.75 nearing overbought suggests pullback likely before further upside

long_assessment.reasoning: Price broke above 30100 psychological level (was resistance, now potential support). A pullback to 30100 offers a LEVEL_TRADE long with confluence: flipped psychological level, 33 pts above EMA21 (30079.82) providing dynamic support confluence, and 26.5 pts above the bullish FVG top (30081.25). LIMIT order at 30100 captures the bounce. Stop at 30065 sits 35 pts below entry, below both the FVG zone (30073.50-30081.25) and EMA21, giving breathing room. Target at 30200 (raw) / 30195 (final with -5 buffer) targets the next major psychological level. R/R = 95/35 = 2.71:1. Stochastic at 69.75 shows momentum but nearing overbought, favoring pullback entry over chase. Confidence 0.65: level just flipped, but strong uptrend and room to 30200 support the setup.

short_assessment.reasoning: No viable short setup. The only structural target is the bullish FVG fill at 30078.50 (final target), 35.25 pts below current price. However, trend is strongly bullish (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150), stochastic at 69.75 is not overbought, and a proper stop would require 30+ pts above recent highs (30115+), yielding <1.2:1 R/R — below 1.3 minimum. The massive bearish FVG at 30680-30756 is 638 pts away, irrelevant for intraday. No counter-trend confluence exists.
